changeSet.author: nour
changeSet.sql:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS vehicle_valuation_history ( id BIGINT GENERATED BY DEFAULT AS IDENTITY PRIMARY KEY, vehicle_id BIGINT NOT NULL, dealer_retail_value NUMERIC(15, 2), trade_in_value NUMERIC(15, 2), private_sale_value NUMERIC(15, 2), auction_value NUMERIC(15, 2), average_market_value NUMERIC(15, 2), valuation_confidence VARCHAR(20), valuation_date TIMESTAMPTZ, created_at TIMESTAMPTZ NOT NULL DEFAULT NOW(), created_by VARCHAR(255) );
COMMENT ON TABLE vehicle_valuation_history IS 'Valuation snapshots used by the Valuation Engine and history chart';
